content.observe: Two very different philosophies for the same problem — one tightly controlled top to bottom, one open and fragmented by design.
content.fault: You expected the same architecture to explain both. It doesn't. Compare them side by side, not as one system.

hotspots.label: iOS
hotspots.detail: A closed, vertically integrated architecture — one vendor, tightly controlled layers.

hotspots.label: Android
hotspots.detail: An open, Linux-kernel-based architecture with layers customizable across many vendors.
